name: IT Asset Manager - Odoo
postCreateCommand: bash -lc 'apt-get update && apt-get install -y git vim nano tmux && git config --global user.name "IT Asset Manager" && git config --global user.email "dev@it-assets.local" && echo && echo === IT Asset Manager - Odoo 17 Dev Environment === && echo && echo [OK] Git, vim, nano, tmux instalados && echo [OK] Extensiones VS Code: Python, Ruff, Odoo, GitLens && echo [OK] Git configurado: user.name="IT Asset Manager" && echo && echo Servicios disponibles: && echo "  - Odoo 17: http://localhost:8069" && echo "  - PostgreSQL 15: localhost:5432" && echo && echo Modulo: addons/it_assets_manager && echo Plan: Ver PLAN_DE_DESARROLLO.md && echo && echo Nota: La BD se crea automaticamente en primer arranque && echo'
